sessionSummary: Phase 2 PR-4 adds JSON-mode git provenance without changing the authored memory narrative.

observations.title: JSON-mode provenance branch
observations.narrative: Verified the workflow adds only git provenance for JSON-mode saves.
facts: The save path should preserve the authored summary and decisions.

filesModified.description: Add JSON-mode-only provenance injection beside Step 3.5.

keyDecisions.decision: Keep JSON-mode provenance injection separate from capture-mode enrichment
keyDecisions.rationale: Avoid leaking captured-session summary, observations, trigger phrases, and decisions into structured JSON saves.

nextSteps: Confirm workflow.ts diff stays within the accepted tiny-patch bound
